playbook.intent: Signed SOW to delivered project with measured margin, NPS, and a retainer-or-referral conversation booked.
playbook.scope: A signed SOW becomes a delivered project: kickoff, requirements baseline, delivery in waves, change-controlled scope, final acceptance, retainer-or-referral conversation. Net margin and NPS measured. Exit artifact: closure pack (lessons-learned, NPS, margin row, referral or retainer follow-up scheduled).

success-criteria.criterion: Kickoff held within 5 working days of signature
Baselined requirements with traceability to acceptance criteria
Scope changes processed via change-control with priced CRs
Closure pack delivered: lessons-learned + NPS + margin

stage.name: Kickoff
stage.intent: Set rhythm, RACI, escalation; baseline scope and risks.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once stakeholders confirmed RACI + cadence in writing.

stage.name: Baseline + plan
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when AC matrix complete and signed by sponsor.

stage.name: Deliver in waves
stage.intent: Wave-based delivery with mid-cycle validation gates.
stage.decision-gate: Advance wave when AC pass + sponsor signs the wave note.

stage.name: Change control
stage.intent: Every scope change is priced; no quiet drift.
stage.decision-gate: No work on unpriced CRs. No exceptions for 'small' changes.

stage.name: Acceptance + close
stage.intent: Final acceptance + closure pack + upsell signal.
stage.decision-gate: Required: signed acceptance + closure pack + booked follow-up. Otherwise project is not closed.

extra.value: [Multi-year transformation programs - out of scope, Fully software-product delivery - separate playbook]
[Signed SOW + deposit cleared, Identified delivery lead (founder or contractor)]
[Letting scope drift via Slack without CRs - kills margin invisibly, Skipping NPS because 'the client seemed happy' - kills referral motion, Closing the project without booking the next conversation]
['Is every AC mapped to a delivered artifact?', 'Did every scope change move through written CR?', 'Did I leave the engagement with a planned follow-up?']

{human: faion get-content project-from-kickoff-to-client-signoff --format md, agent: faion get-content project-from-kickoff-to-client-signoff --format context, json: faion get-content project-from-kickoff-to-client-signoff --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
